layers.name: NYC Borough Boundaries
layers.intended_use: orientation layer for PMAI-NYTW26 recommendation result pages
layers.notes: Use as a lightweight map layer. Do not treat this as geocoding output for event locations.

references.name: NYC Digital City Map
references.notes: Referenced as the fuller official city map source. Not mirrored because it is larger street-map data and changes often.

references.name: NYC Open Data Digital City Map - Shapefile
references.notes: NYC Open Data page describes DCM and points users to NYC Planning for current access.
